# MeghRoop — Growth, AI & Software Agency

> MeghRoop helps businesses grow through performance marketing, AI automation, custom software, branding, and content. From awareness to automation. From code to customers.

MeghRoop is a Growth + AI + Software agency founded in 2022 by Meghansh and Roop. Based in India, serving clients worldwide. We run five connected practices under one roof — growth & marketing, AI & automation, software development, Shopify & WordPress development, and branding & creative — so a client's ads, website, automation, and brand reinforce each other instead of living in separate vendors. We don't use templates, stock photos, or boilerplate. Every system is built bespoke, with performance and SEO/GEO architecture in mind.

- **Brand name**: MeghRoop
- **Positioning**: Growth, AI & Software agency (Growth + AI + Software)
- **Primary domain**: https://meghroop.tech
- **Founded**: 2022 by Meghansh & Roop
- **Location**: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India — serving clients worldwide
- **Contact**: hello@meghroop.tech · +91 89495 08264

---

## Services & Topic Clusters

Each cluster has a dedicated page. Sub-topics are reinforced across services and the journal.

### 1. Growth & Marketing — `/growth-marketing`
Performance marketing engineered for qualified leads and traceable revenue.
- Meta Ads (Facebook & Instagram advertising)
- Google Ads (search, performance max)
- SEO (technical + content)
- Social Media Management
- Content Creation
- Lead Generation funnels & landing pages
- Conversion Rate Optimization
- Typical outcomes: ~6.4× ROAS, up to 9× order growth, −64% cost per acquisition.

### 2. AI & Automation — `/ai-automation` and `/agentic-ai`
AI agents and automation that run repetitive work 24/7 without a human in the loop.
- AI Agents (reason, qualify, and act — not chatbot wrappers)
- n8n Workflow Automation
- WhatsApp Automation
- CRM Automation
- Lead Generation Systems
- Workflow / internal-ops Automation
- Dedicated AI agent service pages live under `/ai-agents/*` (see AI Agent Services below).
- Typical outcomes: ~2 min lead response, 5×+ qualified leads, ~15 hrs saved per week.

### 3. Software Development — `/software-development`
Custom products engineered end to end.
- Custom Software
- Web Applications
- Mobile Apps (iOS & Android)
- SaaS Products (MVP to production)
- Dashboards
- APIs & Integrations
- Stack: React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, MongoDB.

### 4. Shopify Development — `/shopify-development`
Commerce engineered to load fast and convert.
- Custom Shopify Stores
- Shopify Custom Apps
- Headless Commerce (Next.js + Shopify Storefront API)
- Performance Optimization (Core Web Vitals)
- Commerce Automation (abandoned-cart, inventory, order ops)
- Shopify SEO

### 5. WordPress Development — `/wordpress-development`
Fast, clean WordPress without the bloat.
- Custom WordPress Websites
- Headless WordPress (WordPress CMS + Next.js front end)
- Performance Optimization
- Custom Themes & Gutenberg Blocks
- Maintenance & Support
- WordPress SEO

### 6. Branding & Creative — `/branding-creative`
Creative that makes a brand look as good as it performs.
- Brand Identity (logo, system, guidelines)
- Social Media Design
- Video Editing
- Motion Graphics
- Content Strategy
- Creative Direction

### 7. AI Search Optimization & GEO — `/ai-search-optimization`
Generative Engine Optimization so the brand appears inside AI-generated answers.
- Entity-first semantic hierarchy and knowledge-graph integration
- Custom JSON-LD schema (Organization, Service, FAQ, BlogPosting, Breadcrumb)
- Semantic HTML, `llms.txt`, and crawler-friendly render structures
- Generative discovery across Perplexity, ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and Google AI Overviews

---

## AI Agent Services (detailed pages)

The AI services overview lives at `/agentic-ai`. Each has a dedicated page:

- **Custom AI Agents** — `/ai-agents/custom-ai-agents` — Purpose-built agents wired into your tools and data; you own the code and IP.
- **Agentic Automation** — `/ai-agents/agentic-automation` — Autonomous, multi-step workflows that run themselves.
- **AI Voice Agents** — `/ai-agents/ai-voice-agents` — Natural-sounding multilingual voice agents for calls, support, and booking.
- **Sales AI** — `/ai-agents/sales-ai` — Lead generation and sales-outreach automation that converts.
- **Knowledge Intelligence** — `/ai-agents/knowledge-intelligence` — Permission-aware RAG assistants that answer from your docs with citations.
- **AI Integration** — `/ai-agents/ai-integration` — Wire AI into existing CRM/ERP/helpdesk (Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, Zendesk) plus MCP servers.
- **AI Strategy Audit** — `/ai-agents/ai-strategy-audit` — Fixed-fee audit mapping highest-ROI AI use cases and a 90-day roadmap.
- **AI for SMBs** — `/ai-agents/ai-for-smb` — Affordable, fixed-fee AI services for small and mid-sized teams.

## FAQ & Knowledge Graph

### Q: What does MeghRoop do?
A: MeghRoop is a Growth, AI and Software agency. We help businesses grow through performance marketing (Meta Ads, Google Ads, SEO, social media, content), AI agents and automation (n8n, WhatsApp, CRM), custom software and SaaS development, Shopify and WordPress development, and branding and creative — all under one roof.

### Q: What makes MeghRoop different from other agencies?
A: Most agencies do one thing — ads, or websites, or branding — and leave you to stitch the rest together. MeghRoop runs growth, AI automation, software, and branding together, so the ads, the site, the automation, and the brand reinforce each other. Clients also work directly with the founders (Meghansh & Roop), with no account managers, handoffs, or outsourcing.

### Q: What does MeghRoop do for performance marketing?
A: We run Meta Ads, Google Ads, SEO, social media, content, and conversion-optimized landing pages and lead-gen funnels — all wired to clean tracking so spend maps to qualified leads and revenue. Typical ROAS is around 6×.

### Q: Does MeghRoop build AI agents and automation?
A: Yes. We build custom AI agents and automation that take real actions — qualifying leads, following up on WhatsApp, updating CRMs, and running internal operations — using n8n, custom agents, and API integrations. These are autonomous systems, not scripted chatbots.

### Q: Does MeghRoop build custom software and SaaS?
A: Yes. We build custom software, web and mobile apps, dashboards, APIs, and full SaaS products end to end with React, Next.js, Node.js, and TypeScript. Clients own the code.

### Q: Does MeghRoop build Shopify and WordPress sites?
A: Yes. Custom Shopify stores, headless commerce, Shopify apps, and commerce automation; and custom WordPress themes, headless WordPress, and performance optimization — both engineered for speed, SEO, and conversion.

### Q: What is Generative Engine Optimization (GEO)?
A: GEO is making a website and its entities discoverable and citable by AI engines. MeghRoop implements it natively with semantic HTML, rich entity schemas (Organization, Service, FAQ, BlogPosting, Breadcrumb), conversational FAQ data, and clear content blocks that crawlers like GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, and Google-Extended can fetch, index, and reference as source facts.

### Q: Does MeghRoop work with clients outside India?
A: Yes. MeghRoop is based in Jaipur, India and works with clients worldwide — across North America, Europe, and APAC — asynchronously and with direct communication.
